description.en: Attacks an enemy and reduces the target's <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>-30%</color>DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并使目标的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>降低<color=#28d9ed>-30%</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect) When the caster has a <color=#28d9ed>Barrier</color>, reduces Weakness Gauge damage taken by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>.\n(Triggered Effect) When hit by a single-target attack, counterattacks and recovers Weakness Gauge by <color=#28d9ed>1</color>.\nThe counterattack effect is only activated once every <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)<color=#28d9ed>シールド</color>がある場合、受けるWGダメージが<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>DOWNする。反撃は<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>に1回発動する。\n(発動効果)敵から単体攻撃を受けた場合、反撃してWGを<color=#28d9ed>1</color>回復する。
description.kr: (패시브 효과) <color=#28d9ed>실드</color> 보유 시 받는 WG 피해량이 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 감소합니다.\n(발동 효과) 단일 대상 공격을 받을 시 반격하고 WG를 <color=#28d9ed>1</color> 회복합니다. \n반격은 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color>에 한 번만 발동합니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)附带<color=#28d9ed>护盾</color>效果时,使所受WG伤害量降低<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>。\n(触发效果)受到单体攻击时,发动反击,并使WG恢复<color=#28d9ed>1</color>。\n反击<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>仅能发动1次。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and lowers the <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of the target by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.\nDeals greatly increased <color=#28d9ed>damage </color> if the caster is granted Increased Attack.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、対象の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>-20%</color>DOWNさせる。\n自分の攻撃力がUPした状態の場合、与える<color=#28d9ed>ダメージ</color>が大幅にUPする。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>-20%</color> 감소시킵니다.\n공격력 증가 효과를 보유하고 있으면 <color=#28d9ed>피해량</color>이 대폭 증가 합니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并使目标的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>降低 <color=#28d9ed>-20%</color>。若目标附带攻击力提升效果,则大幅提升<color=#28d9ed>伤害量</color>。
